keyEvents.text: Goal!  Honduras 0, Cuba 1. Maykel Reyes (Cuba) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Luis Paradela with a through ball   following a fast break.
Goal!  Honduras 1, Cuba 1. Anthony Lozano (Honduras) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Luis Palma   following a set piece situation.
Goal!  Honduras 2, Cuba 1. Edwin Rodríguez (Honduras) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Anthony Lozano.
Substitution, Cuba. Karel Pérez replaces Carlos Vázquez because of an injury.
Eduardo Hernández (Cuba) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cuba. Dairon Reyes replaces Maykel Reyes.
Substitution, Cuba. Romario Torrez replaces Karel Espino.
Substitution, Cuba. Rey Rodríguez replaces Eduardo Hernández.
Substitution, Honduras. Carlos Pineda replaces Luis Palma.
Substitution, Honduras. David Ruíz replaces Jorge Álvarez.
Substitution, Cuba. Willian Pozo replaces Yasnier Matos.
Substitution, Honduras. Rubilio Castillo replaces Anthony Lozano.
Substitution, Honduras. Kervin Arriaga replaces Deybi Flores.
Goal!  Honduras 3, Cuba 1. Rubilio Castillo (Honduras) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by David Ruíz.
Substitution, Honduras. Alexy Vega replaces Michael Chirinos.
Rey Rodríguez (Cuba) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Romario Torrez (Cuba) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
